steps.commit: feat: init project structure and index.html skeleton
steps.description: Created the app shell, documentation shell, README, and static callback helper.

steps.commit: feat: add Spotify OAuth PKCE flow
steps.description: Implemented Spotify OAuth 2.0 PKCE login, callback handling, and local token storage.

steps.commit: feat: fetch playlist tracks from Spotify API
steps.description: Added playlist ID parsing and paginated Spotify track fetching with duration data.
The split algorithm keeps track order and chooses the longest Side A that fits.

steps.commit: feat: render Side A and Side B tracklists in UI
steps.description: Side A and Side B tracklists render with timestamps and durations.
The app can send the optimized playlist order back to Spotify.

steps.commit: feat: implement playback start via Spotify API
steps.description: Playback can start Side A through the Spotify player API.

steps.commit: feat: add real-time countdown timer for Side A
steps.description: A live countdown tracks the remaining Side A recording time.

steps.commit: feat: auto-pause at Side A end and show flip banner
steps.description: The app pauses automatically at the end of Side A and shows the flip prompt.

steps.commit: feat: add Start Side B resume button
steps.description: Side B can be started separately after flipping the cassette.

steps.commit: feat: cassette tape visual progress bar
steps.description: The cassette visual shows tape fill and side capacity.

steps.commit: feat: dark mode UI and retro styling
steps.description: The app uses a minimal dark retro monospace interface.

steps.commit: fix: error handling for no active device
steps.description: Player errors explain how to activate a Spotify device.
Expired Spotify access tokens refresh through the PKCE refresh token.

steps.commit: docs: add README with setup instructions
steps.description: Setup and usage instructions are documented.
